author: Firecrawl Team
description: Turn any website into LLM-ready data. Scrape, crawl, extract structured data từ bất kỳ URL. Bổ sung cho LangExtract (web fetcher) và LightRAG (RAG indexer). Phase 2 integration.

dependencies.optional_local: scrapling (fallback khi không có API key)

conflict_check.langextract: SAFE — langextract extracts entities FROM TEXT, firecrawl FETCHES text from web. Complementary pipeline.
conflict_check.scrapling: PARTIAL overlap — scrapling is fallback (no API key). Use firecrawl when API available.
conflict_check.agent_browser: SAFE — agent-browser handles JS-heavy sites, firecrawl handles standard sites.

pipeline.research_task: Agent calls firecrawl_adapter.research_url() → gets markdown → feeds to Claude
pipeline.rag_ingestion: crawl_site(url) → insert each page into LightRAG knowledge graph

notes: Phase 2 DONE 2026-03-23. Hooks: onResearch/onCrawlDocs/onExtractData. Noop mode khi chua cai firecrawl-py hoac chua co API key.
